title: PyLabRobot documentation homepage
agent_notes: Official documentation entry point for PyLabRobot user guides and API reference.

title: PyLabRobot official GitHub repository
agent_notes: Official repository describes PyLabRobot as a hardware-agnostic Python library for liquid handling robots and other lab automation equipment.

title: Using the Visualizer with ChatterboxBackend
agent_notes: Official guide states ChatterboxBackend is software-only, prints commands to the console, and can be used with the Visualizer to simulate behavior without a physical robot.

title: OT-2 Simulator with Visualizer
agent_notes: Official guide shows OpentronsOT2Simulator setup, Visualizer setup, labware assignment, pick-up, aspirate, dispense, and return-tip log output.

title: Using Trackers
agent_notes: Official guide documents tip tracker state, volume tracker state, tracker enable/disable controls, and documented tracker errors before hardware execution.

title: Getting started with liquid handling on a Hamilton STAR(let)
agent_notes: Official guide demonstrates LiquidHandler setup, deck/resource usage, pick_up_tips, aspirate, and dispense commands. Hardware examples are grounding only and are not authorization for live execution.

title: LiquidHandlerChatterboxBackend API reference
agent_notes: Official API page describes LiquidHandlerChatterboxBackend as device-free testing and lists aspirate, dispense, can_pick_up_tip, and tip operations.

title: Liquid handling backend package boundary
agent_notes: Official API page separates abstract, hardware, and testing backends. This pack selects testing/simulation semantics and records hardware backends as a no-live boundary.
